name: get_status
description: Check the current status of a transaction by its ID. Requires user token (alu_) authentication. Returns status ('pending', 'spent', or 'denied'), amount, merchant, purpose, and expiry time for pending transactions. Card details are included only when the status is 'spent' and agent_id matches the transaction's owning agent. Use this to poll for approval results and retrieve card details after a request_payment call in manual approval mode.

transaction_id.description: The unique transaction ID returned by request_payment.

agent_id.description: Your agent identifier. Must match the requesting_agent_id used in the original request_payment call to receive card details.
